examples: James Mason costars, and nearly steals the movie, as a highwayman with whom our antiheroine becomes entangled.
The highwayman came riding, up to the old inn - door.
It is said that at one time a highwayman lived in the house.
In 1792, Jacques Pelletier, a highwayman, became the first person to be guillotined in France, on the Place de Greve in Paris.
Rosa filled young Hugo's head with stories about his great-grandfather, a highwayman by the name of Maizanta, whom local historians had cast in the style of a Robin Hood.
